title: Upgrade strategies for Amazon RDS for MySQL 8.0 to 8.4
text: This post is part of a two-part series on upgrading RDS for MySQL 8.0 to 8.4. Here, we cover the end of standard support timeline, extended support costs, upgrade methods, and key best practices. For a step-by-step implementation guide, see Best practices for upgrading RDS for MySQL 8.0 to 8.4 with prechecks, Blue/Green, and rollback.
